name: Grep
description: Fast search tool using ripgrep. ALWAYS use Grep for searches - NEVER use grep/rg as Bash commands. Supports regex patterns, file filtering by glob/type, and output modes. Use Task tool for open-ended multi-round searches. Literal braces need escaping: use interface\\{\\} to find interface{}.

pattern.description: The regex pattern to search for

path.description: File or directory to search (defaults to current directory)

type.description: File type filter (js, py, rust, go, java, etc.)

output_mode.description: Output mode: content (lines), files_with_matches (paths), count (counts). Default: files_with_matches

-C.description: Lines before and after match (content mode only)

head_limit.description: Limit output to first N results

multiline.description: Enable multiline mode for cross-line patterns
